meaning: n.比阿特丽斯(<<神曲>>中人物)
examples: He was full of remorse and asked Beatrice what he could do to make amends.
Her elder sister Princess Beatrice, 20, also loves touring and spends just as much as her.
Betty Blue is a movie starring French actress Beatrice Dalle.
If you had the opportunity to give feedback to Princess Beatrice, what would you have said?
At Beatrice hospital in Harare, bodies were piled in the mortuary, awaiting relatives to collect them.
